de.name: Multi-Channel-Händler
de.description:
Volumen-Spiel über mehrere Kanäle — eigener Shop + Amazon + eBay
+ ggf. Otto/Kaufland. Bestände-Sync, Pricing und schmale Margen
bei hohem Auftragsdurchsatz.

emphasis.overview: Welche Kanäle macht ihr profitabel — und welche tragen das System nur mit?
emphasis.channels: Anteil + Marge pro Kanal scharf machen. Kanal-spezifische Preise + Versandkosten.
emphasis.products: Sortiments-Breite vs. Tiefe — was läuft auf welchem Kanal? EOL-Strategie.
emphasis.masterdata: Sauberes SKU-Schema + Pflichtfelder pro Kanal (Amazon ASIN, eBay-Kategorien, GTIN).
emphasis.logistics: Carrier-Mix + Lagerstrategie (Eigenlager vs. FBA vs. 3PL) — entscheidet euer Cost-to-Serve.
emphasis.systems: Channel-Integrationen sind die Lebensader. Bestände-Sync darf nie hängen.
emphasis.unit: Kanal-spezifische Margen rechnen — Marktplatz-Gebühren + Werbekosten + Retouren mit drin.
emphasis.reporting: Pro Kanal — Umsatz, Marge, Bestand, Retourenquote. Tageswert + Trend.
emphasis.custom_agents: Bestände-Sync, Pricing-Repricer, Marktplatz-Listings — Slots klar terminieren.

tasks.title: Logo + Beleg-Footer
tasks.hint: Belege je Kanal (Privat/Geschäft) sauber trennen

tasks.title: SKU-Schema final
tasks.hint: Einheitliches GTIN/ASIN/EAN-Schema vor Listing-Sync

tasks.title: Amazon Seller-Account verbinden
tasks.hint: MWS/SP-API-Token + FBA/FBM-Strategie pro SKU

tasks.title: eBay / Kaufland / Otto verbinden
tasks.hint: Token + kanalspezifische Preise · Versandkosten · Lieferzeit

tasks.title: Stammdaten-CSV pro Kanal
tasks.hint: Pflichtfelder pro Marktplatz — Maße · Bilder · Kategorien · GTIN

tasks.title: Versand-Carrier + Label-Drucker
tasks.hint: Carrier-Mix konfigurieren · Etiketten + Versandbeleg

tasks.title: Repricer-Tool anbinden
tasks.hint: SellerLogic · RepricerExpress · BlackCurve an Xentral koppeln

tasks.title: Bank-Login (FinAPI/EBICS)
tasks.hint: Marktplatz-Auszahlungen automatisch zuordnen

tasks.title: DATEV + OSS-Quartalsmeldung
tasks.hint: EU-B2C-Meldepflicht klären · OSS-Reports vorbereiten

tasks.title: Schulung Marktplatz-Cases
tasks.hint: Retoure Amazon vs. eigener Shop · Bewertungen · Disputes

tasks.title: Test-User CS/Lager/Buchhaltung
tasks.hint: für Multi-Channel-Schulung

tasks.title: Go-Live + Cut-Over-Plan
tasks.hint: Bestände einfrieren · Channels umstellen · Freeze-Wochenende

en.name: Multi-Channel Retailer
en.description:
Volume play across multiple channels — own shop + Amazon + eBay
+ optionally Otto/Kaufland. Inventory sync, pricing and thin
margins at high order throughput.

emphasis.overview: Which channels are you running profitably — and which only carry the system?
emphasis.channels: Sharpen share + margin per channel. Channel-specific prices + shipping costs.
emphasis.products: Range breadth vs. depth — what runs on which channel? EOL strategy.
emphasis.masterdata: Clean SKU scheme + mandatory fields per channel (Amazon ASIN, eBay categories, GTIN).
emphasis.logistics: Carrier mix + warehouse strategy (own warehouse vs. FBA vs. 3PL) — decides your cost-to-serve.
emphasis.systems: Channel integrations are the lifeline. Inventory sync must never hang.
emphasis.unit: Calculate channel-specific margins — marketplace fees + ad cost + returns included.
emphasis.reporting: Per channel — revenue, margin, stock, return rate. Daily value + trend.
emphasis.custom_agents: Inventory sync, pricing repricer, marketplace listings — schedule slots clearly.

tasks.title: Logo + document footer
tasks.hint: Cleanly separate documents per channel (B2C/B2B)

tasks.title: SKU scheme final
tasks.hint: Unified GTIN/ASIN/EAN scheme before listing sync

tasks.title: Connect Amazon seller account
tasks.hint: MWS/SP-API token + FBA/FBM strategy per SKU

tasks.title: Connect eBay / Kaufland / Otto
tasks.hint: Tokens + channel-specific prices · shipping · lead time

tasks.title: Master-data CSV per channel
tasks.hint: Mandatory fields per marketplace — dimensions · images · categories · GTIN

tasks.title: Shipping carrier + label printer
tasks.hint: Configure carrier mix · labels + shipping document

tasks.title: Connect repricer tool
tasks.hint: SellerLogic · RepricerExpress · BlackCurve linked to Xentral

tasks.title: Bank login (FinAPI/EBICS)
tasks.hint: Marketplace payouts auto-matched

tasks.title: DATEV + OSS quarterly filing
tasks.hint: Clarify EU B2C reporting · prepare OSS reports

tasks.title: Marketplace-case training
tasks.hint: Returns on Amazon vs. own shop · reviews · disputes

tasks.title: Test user CS/warehouse/accounting
tasks.hint: For multi-channel training

tasks.title: Go-live + cut-over plan
tasks.hint: Freeze stock · switch channels · freeze weekend
